name: @local/freeform
description: Build forms, collect submissions, and send notifications directly from EmDash.

scripts.build: mkdir -p .tmp dist && tsdown src/index.ts --format esm --outDir dist --dts false && TMPDIR="$(pwd)/.tmp" emdash-plugin build
scripts.build:watch: mkdir -p .tmp dist && TMPDIR="$(pwd)/.tmp" emdash-plugin build && tsdown src/index.ts --format esm --outDir dist --dts false --no-clean --watch
